title: Genesis of the Ashantis
overview: Once Upon A Time, The Great Ashanti Tribe and Guans in Ghana, Africa went to war because of the Golden Horn. Whoever gets the Golden Horn will be Supreme among all the Tribes, but the Prophecy has it that only the Chosen One can hold the Golden Horn...between the Prince of the Ashantis and the Guans who is the Chosen One and who will win this battle?
